title: RENT ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: REDMOND OFFICE RENT ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides short-term rent assistance with eviction prevention or move-in costs, including rent deposit. Medium-term Rental Subsidies include a deposit, rental assistance, and case management and supportive services. 2303 SW 1st Street Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: All services: Must meet 80% of the Area Median Income Short-term: Proof of need (significant income loss, behind on rent, eviction notice, etc.) Medium-term: Experiencing literal homelessness or at risk of homelessness. Income eligibility varies. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 548-2380 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 548-2380 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for information. Medium-term rental subsidies referrals are provided through Coordinated Entry. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties and the Confederated Tribes of Warm Springs SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Services: Rent Payment Assistance Rental Deposit Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY HEAD START EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - HEAD START FOOD - FRESH EXPRESS HOME DELIVERY FOOD - MOBILE FOOD PANTRY FOOD - NEIGHBORIMPACT FOOD BANK HOUSING/SHELTER - CENTRAL OREGON’S COORDINATED ENTRY SYSTEM HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMESOURCE HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - LENDING MONEY MANAGEMENT - REPRESENTATIVE PAYEE PROGRAM UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. REDMOND OFFICE
